description: You are an Occupational Health and Safety Specialist at a large chemical distribution facility storing 15 different chemicals across 4 buildings. Management has received an anonymous safety complaint alleging improper chemical storage practices, and OSHA has notified the facility of an inspection next Tuesday. Conduct a comprehensive chemical storage segregation audit using the facility chemical inventory in ~/Desktop/facility_chemical_inventory.csv and CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Identify all dangerous chemical co-storage situations currently present in the facility and produce a comprehensive audit report at ~/Documents/storage_audit_report.txt. The report must identify specific dangerous chemical pairs and their locations (buildings/bays), describe potential hazardous reactions, rate each by severity (critical/high/medium), identify violations of NFPA and OSHA standards, and provide specific corrective action recommendations for each pair.
